title: Venezuelan Fried Bread
description: A simple fried bread dish inspired by Venezuelan cuisine. It's crispy on the outside and fluffy on the inside.

ingredients.name: fried
ingredients.notes: about 1-2 inches deep in a pan

instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a deep frying pan over medium-high heat.
When the oil reaches 350°F (180°C), add a few bread cubes to the oil.
Fry the bread cubes for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Drain the fried bread on paper towels.
